title: 'The presence of PFAS in my blood is out of my control': Six Europeans on living in 'forever pollution' hotspots
subhed: Being a victim is neither a profession nor their identity. Meta, Cristina, Doris, Stéphanie, Mari and Toon live in PFAS contamination hotspots in six European countries.

title: The devastated residents of Chibab Tower, struck by four Israeli missiles
subhed: Israel targeted Ali Yusuf Harshi, the nephew and secretary of Hezbollah leader Naim Kassem. The attack killed 10 people in this 1970s apartment building, which stood as a symbol of Lebanon's ability to 'live together.'

title: PSG reach Champions League semi-finals after Dembélé's double against Liverpool
subhed: Paris Saint-Germain, who won 2-0 at Anfield on Tuesday,  will now face Bayern Munich or 15-time winners Real Madrid in the last four. Luis Enrique's team remains on course to become the only side other than Madrid to retain the competition in the Champions League era.

title: New online search tool in Germany reveals if ancestors were Nazi Party members
subhed: In partnership with American and German archives, the weekly 'Die Zeit' has launched a searchable tool granting access to more than 12 million documents, cataloging the bulk of Nazi Party (NSDAP) memberships from 1925 to 1945.

title: One year ahead of French presidential election, survey shows deep desire for change
